question: Average website sign-ups per year are shown in the chart. Which of the following statements is true?

options.A: The most recent year clearly has the lowest sign-ups in the entire period.
options.B: The chart does not provide enough information to draw conclusions about the full-year trend in the most recent year.
options.C: The most recent year shows a sharp decline in sign-ups compared with previous years.
options.D: Sign-ups per year have been permanently declining since 2020.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 3 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (364 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 1,440 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
